dealSummary: Fintech startup Ramp is raising a $750 million round led by Iconiq Capital and Singapore's sovereign wealth fund GIC at a valuation above $40 billion, The Wall Street Journal reported.
leadInvestors: Iconiq Capital, Singapore's sovereign wealth fund GIC

dealSummary: Nova Intelligence, the developer of an agentic AI platform for SAP systems, raised a $31.5 million Series A led by Chemistry Ventures, Fortune reported.
Fazeshift, a startup developing agents for accounts receivable workflows, secured a $17 million Series A led by F-Prime.
Develo, a company focused on electronic medical records in pediatrics, received a $14 million Series A led by Blueprint Equity, Axios reported.
Blockchain data infrastructure company Balcony, which focuses on the real estate economy, raised a $12.7 million seed round led by Blockchange Ventures.
